task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating the agent has successfully logged in using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Financial Years (Exercices) section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the 'Exercices' (Financial Years) page, typically found under the accounting or settings menu in the French interface.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new financial year
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form for creating a new financial year (e.g., 'Nouvel exercice') is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct start date for the financial year
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start date field ('Date de début') contains '01/01/2017' or '2017-01-01'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct end date for the financial year
task_completion.visual_evidence: The end date field ('Date de fin') contains '31/12/2017' or '2017-12-31'.
The currency dropdown or field ('Devise') is set to 'EUR' or 'Euro'.

task_completion.description: Save the new financial year and verify its creation
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed, or the newly created 2017 financial year is visible in the list of financial years ('Exercices').

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Ekylibre web interface in a browser. There should be no terminal windows open executing backend scripts, curl commands, or rails console commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual web form
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing dates and selecting dropdowns in the standard Ekylibre web form, rather than writing the answers in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) are not open to artificially inject the success message or alter the HTML table to show the financial year.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Ekylibre interface is in French. Look for terms like 'Exercices' (Financial Years), 'Date de début' (Start Date), 'Date de fin' (End Date), and 'Devise' (Currency). The expected start date is exactly '2017-01-01' (or '01/01/2017' in French locale format). The expected end date is exactly '2017-12-31' (or '31/12/2017'). The expected currency is 'EUR' (Euro).
